Scenario: Verify existing Account has Billing Address and Payment Terms on the Details tab
Expected Result: Account loads; Billing Address and Payment Terms fields are present (soft-fail if empty/missing)

Scenario: Create Contact on Account, create Opportunity from Contact, verify Primary Contact Role
Expected Result: Contact created and linked to Account; Opportunity created; Contact appears as Primary Contact Role

Scenario: Create Quote from Opportunity, browse catalogs, select price book and All Products, add product, validate cart
Expected Result: Quote created; product added via catalog; line items visible on quote

Scenario: Accept Quote, create Contract via dropdown with no prices, open contract and activate with Contract Term
Expected Result: Quote status set to Accepted; Contract created; Contract status Activated; Contract Term filled

Scenario: Open Quote, create single Order, open Order, activate and mark complete
Expected Result: Order created from Quote; Order navigated to; Order status Activated/Complete
